title: OAuth authorization code grant | Shopify app docs
focusedElement: INPUT Redirect URI redirect_uri field input
visibleText:
OAuth authorization code grant
To request authorization, configure your app client ID, redirect URI, requested scopes, and state parameter. The redirect URI must match the allowed callback URL in the app configuration. After the merchant approves the app, Shopify redirects back with a code. Exchange the code for an access token.
